snippet.title: W. L. Mellon Speaker Series: William Demchak
snippet.description:
The W.L. Mellon Speaker Series is a forum that encourages insightful and lively dialogue between Tepper students and global leaders, CEOs, and management experts. William "Bill" Demchak is in his element in rapidly-changing environments punctuated by periods of crisis. As chairman, President and CEO of The PNC Financial Services Group, one of the largest diversified financial services companies in the U.S, he has seen his share.

In this video, Demchak imparts wisdom and candid insight gained through his career.

snippet.title: Bitcoin dips post-jobs report, and Core Scientific to hand over rigs to pay debt: CNBC Crypto World
snippet.description:
CNBC Crypto World features the latest news and daily trading updates from the digital currency markets and provides viewers with a look at what’s ahead with high-profile interviews, explainers, and unique stories from the ever-changing crypto industry. On today’s show, Andrew Thurman, head of content at Nansen, discusses the analytics firm’s research on liquid staking and what to expect from the Ethereum network’s next upgrade. 

Chapters: 
00:00 - CNBC Crypto World, Feb 3, 2023
0:26- Bitcoin dips
1:14- The headlines
4:25 Andrew Thurman of Nansen

snippet.title: Collaboration Corner at DCW 2023
snippet.description:
🎥 #𝘾𝙤𝙡𝙡𝙖𝙗𝙤𝙧𝙖𝙩𝙞𝙤𝙣𝘾𝙤𝙧𝙣𝙚𝙧 goes to #DCW2023 🎥

Revizto  🤝 Digital Construction Week 

Great to get back out on the shop floor with friends, clients and partners!

Thanks to all those that took the time to speak to me during the crazy 2 days:

Oliver Hughes of Digital Construction Week 
Adam Fairbairn  of Procore Technologies 
Greg Demchak of Bentley Systems 
Tom Gould, Shane Considine  of Skanska 
John Williams 
David Philp  of Cohesive   
Duncan Reed of Trimble Inc. 
FULmax 
Jonathan Walters of Kier Group 
Johnathan Munkley of WSP | ZERO 
Roman Baran of Canary Wharf Group 
Elliott Crossley FCIAT of BDP (Building Design Partnership Ltd) 

👏👏 The Revizto team did an amazing job at the show as usual!
Pam Bhandal | James Lawrence | Ash Curzon | Levi Brown MCInstCES 👏👏

As always I’d love to hear your feedback and if you’d like to #collaborate then get in touch!

🙏 Thanks for watching!

#Coordination #Construction #TeamWork #ReviztoSite #ClashDetection

snippet.title: Market expected to have a fight with the Fed, says Jefferies' David Zervos
snippet.description: David Zervos, Jefferies chief market strategist, joins 'Closing Bell' to discuss the Fed Chair Powell's remarks after raising the rate by 25 basis points.
